expected-messages.message: Local variable 'result' shadows a parameter of the enclosing function.

test-code.description: Local variable does not shadow any parameter
Top-level property does not shadow anything
Local variable in nested function shadows outer function parameter
Function with no parameters cannot shadow
Local variable inside inner block shadows outer function parameter
vararg parameter name can be shadowed by local variable
Destructuring declaration does not trigger false positive
Extension function parameter shadowed by local variable
Local variable inside lambda shadows outer function parameter
Lambda explicit parameter with same name as function parameter
Lambda explicit parameter not shadowing any function parameter
Lambda in nested function shadows outer function parameter
